content: I'm working on some C/Rust kernel module and I want to dump_stack() - is there any way to do it on Rust side?
If you're just debugging you can do unsafe { bindings::dump_stack() };
If you intend to upstream the call, then you'll want to add a safe wrapper.
But it would be quite simple - just define a function with the above as its body.
Nikolai Shv has marked this topic as resolved.
